title: Argentinian Beef Stew
description: A hearty stew originating from Argentina, made with flavorful beef and served with crusty bread.
instructions: Heat oil in a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
Add beef and cook until browned, about 5 minutes. Remove from pot and set aside.
Reduce heat to medium and add onion. Cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Add wine and cook, stirring to scrape up browned bits, until reduced by half, about 5 minutes.
Add broth, tomato paste, and browned beef. Bring to a boil, then cover and transfer to oven.
Bake at 300°F for 2 1/2 hours, or until beef is tender.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
